title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, October 29 2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 29/10/2024
Image reference: 2024-10-29_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-october-29-2024_img1.png
Bulker : Bulker values remain stable this week, with a small decline observed for older tonnage
Kamsarmax BC Nova Optimus (81,800 DWT, Oct 2012, Jiangsu Eastern) sold to Haitong Shipping for USD 16.6 mil, VV Value USD 16.71 mil
Panamax BC HC Victory (75,800 DWT, Jun 2005, Sanoyas) sold to Unknown Chinese buyers for USD 10.7 mil, VV Value USD 11.42 mil
Supramax BC Dalian Star (55,800 DWT, Apr 2017, Oshima) sold to Unknown Turkish buyers for USD 27.5 mil, VV Value USD 26.53 mil
Supramax BC Paro (55,700 DWT, Sep 2009, Mitsui Tamano) sold SS/DD Due to Unknown Chinese buyers for USD 14.8 mil, VV Value USD 15.98 mil
Handy BC Emil Selmer (32,600, Dec 2010, Jiangsu Zhenjiang) sold to undisclosed buyers for 10 mil, VV Value USD 10.09 mil
Tankers: Tanker values remaining stable last week with decrease in MR newbuild values due to a few recent orders
No notable sales
Containers: Container values remain mostly stable, except Post Panamax and Feedermax newbuilds have seen an increase due to recent sales and modern Handys have come down
5x Sub Panamax Seatrade B
